category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Nigerian market under SON / SONCAP.

title.en: China-to-Nigeria LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入奈及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Nigeria's mandatory SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme) regime — Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, NIS-adopted IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 safety and photobiological standards, appliance energy labelling, and NCC type approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与尼日利亚强制性 SONCAP（SON 合格评定程序）制度差距对照——产品证书加每批货物 SONCAP 证书、采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 NIS 安全及光生物标准、家电能效标签，以及智能灯具的 NCC 型号核准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與奈及利亞強制性 SONCAP（SON 合格評定程序）制度差距對照——產品證書加每批貨物 SONCAP 證書、採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 NIS 安全及光生物標準、家電能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 NCC 型號核准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Nigerian law, SON product regulations, the SONCAP scheme rules, the applicable NIS / IEC standard editions, energy-labelling requirements, and NCC type-approval obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行尼日利亚法律、SON 产品法规、SONCAP 计划规则、适用的 NIS / IEC 标准版本、能效标签要求及 NCC 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行奈及利亞法律、SON 產品法規、SONCAP 計劃規則、適用的 NIS / IEC 標準版本、能效標籤要求及 NCC 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Nigeria must clear the mandatory SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme): obtain a Product Certificate (PC) for the model family based on NIS-adopted IEC standards, then a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (SC) issued before vessel loading and required for customs clearance at Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne. Safety is assessed against NIS IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and NIS IEC 60598-2 part standards plus NIS IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps; photobiological safety against NIS IEC 62471; energy efficiency must meet the SON appliance energy-performance and labelling requirement; smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require NCC (Nigerian Communications Commission) type approval. An in-country importer of record is mandatory. Nigeria has no horizontal RoHS-equivalent substance restriction, so EU-style RoHS testing is not a SONCAP entry gate — but it remains good practice and may apply to specific buyer or re-export requirements. CN CCC certification is not recognised for SONCAP; testing must be done to the NIS/IEC editions accepted by SON.
answer_first.zh: 向尼日利亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须通过强制性 SONCAP（SON 合格评定程序）：先就型号系列依据采用 IEC 标准的 NIS 取得产品证书（PC），再就每批货物取得在装船前签发、并为拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或 Onne 清关所必需的 SONCAP 证书（SC）。安全依据 NIS IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 NIS IEC 60598-2 分部标准，自镇流灯依据 NIS IEC 62560 评估；光生物安全依据 NIS IEC 62471 评估；能效须满足 SON 家电能效及标签要求；具备无线功能的智能灯具还须取得 NCC（尼日利亚通信委员会）型号核准。须有在地登记进口商。尼日利亚没有横向的 RoHS 等效物质限制，因此欧盟式 RoHS 检测并非 SONCAP 入境关卡——但仍属良好做法，并可能因特定买方或再出口要求而适用。中国 CCC 认证不被 SONCAP 所认可；检测须按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本进行。
answer_first.zht: 向奈及利亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須通過強制性 SONCAP（SON 合格評定程序）：先就型號系列依據採用 IEC 標準的 NIS 取得產品證書（PC），再就每批貨物取得在裝船前簽發、並為拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或 Onne 清關所必需的 SONCAP 證書（SC）。安全依據 NIS IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 NIS IEC 60598-2 分部標準，自鎮流燈依據 NIS IEC 62560 評估；光生物安全依據 NIS IEC 62471 評估；能效須滿足 SON 家電能效及標籤要求；具備無線功能的智能燈具還須取得 NCC（奈及利亞通信委員會）型號核准。須有在地登記進口商。奈及利亞沒有橫向的 RoHS 等效物質限制，因此歐盟式 RoHS 檢測並非 SONCAP 入境關卡——但仍屬良好做法，並可能因特定買方或再出口要求而適用。中國 CCC 認證不被 SONCAP 所認可；檢測須按 SON 接受的 NIS/IEC 版本進行。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Per change cycle; SONCAP scheme rules, NIS-adopted IEC standard editions, the SON product list, energy-labelling thresholds, and NCC type-approval scope must be re-verified against current SON and NCC guidance before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Mandatory-status and standard-edition fields must be re-checked against SON, SONCAP service-provider, and NCC sources on each review.
